Title: Insights into the missing apiosylation step in flavonoid apiosides biosynthesis of Leguminosae plants

Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Bioactive flavonoids; liquiritin apioside shows antitussive activity
Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Accumulation_Site: roots and rhizomes of licorice; engineered tobacco leaves
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Promotes regioselective formation of liquiritin and isoliquiritin precursors, improving de novo production of liquiritin apioside and isoliquiritin apioside in tobacco
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Co-expression pattern similar to GuCHS, GuCHR, and GuApiGT in G. uralensis
Common_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Transient expression in Nicotiana benthamiana; LC/MS metabolite profiling; replacement of GuGT14 in pathway reconstruction
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. GuGT53 was discovered from G. uralensis by co-expression trend with flavonoid pathway genes. 2. GuGT53 regio-selectively and efficiently catalyzed 4'/4-O-glycosylation of liquiritigenin and isoliquiritigenin to form liquiritin and isoliquiritin. 3. Replacing GuGT14 with GuGT53 improved isoliquiritin apioside production in engineered tobacco by reducing byproduct formation.
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Agrobacterium-mediated transient expression in Nicotiana benthamiana leaves
Common_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: GuGT14 replacement was needed because poor regioselectivity of GuGT14 and endogenous tobacco glycosyltransferases caused byproduct 7a; no specific tradeoff reported for GuGT53
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Useful auxiliary glycosyltransferase for metabolic engineering of flavonoid apiosides by improving regioselective precursor glycosylation in plant chassis
Common_Genes.Omics_Data: RNA-seq transcriptome co-expression analysis; SRA BioProject PRJNA945816
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Acts upstream of apiosylation rather than catalyzing the terminal apiosylation step.

Pathway_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: Plant UDP-glycosyltransferase; UGT79B74; GT-B fold; 45-aa PSPG box with RLGSDH motif
Pathway_Genes.Rate_Limiting_or_Key_Control_Step: Terminal determinant of flavonoid apioside formation; missing apiosylation step resolved by this study
Pathway_Genes.Primary_Substrate: Flavonoid glycosides such as liquiritin and isoliquiritin; UDP-apiose as sugar donor
Pathway_Genes.Primary_Product: 2''-O-apiosylated flavonoid glycosides such as liquiritin apioside and isoliquiritin apioside
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Transfers apiose specifically from UDP-apiose to the 2''-OH of sugar moieties on flavonoid glycosides, producing 2''-O-apiosides
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite: liquiritin apioside; isoliquiritin apioside; other flavonoid apiosides
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Bioactive natural products; plant growth regulation-like roles; liquiritin apioside has antitussive activity
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Accumulation_Site: roots and rhizomes of G. uralensis; engineered tobacco leaves
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Efficiently and regioselectively produces flavonoid 2''-O-apiosides and enables de novo biosynthesis of flavonoid apiosides in tobacco
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: High in roots of G. uralensis and co-expressed with GuCHS and GuCHR
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Transiently expressed in Nicotiana benthamiana leaves for pathway reconstruction
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: RT-PCR cloning; heterologous expression and enzyme assay; LC/MS and NMR product identification; substrate screening; mutagenesis; crystal structure; MD/QM/MM simulations; transient expression in tobacco
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. GuApiGT was identified as the missing phenolic apiosyltransferase from G. uralensis. 2. It almost completely converted liquiritin and isoliquiritin into their 2''-O-apiosides and showed strict selectivity for UDP-apiose over other sugar donors. 3. Structural and mutational analyses identified the RLGSDH motif and 45-aa PSPG box as key determinants of UDP-apiose selectivity. 4. Expression of GuApiGT with upstream pathway genes enabled de novo production of at least 10 flavonoid apiosides in tobacco.
Pathway_Genes.Interacting_Proteins: UAXS (functional coupling in UDP-apiose supply system)
Pathway_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: In vitro assays with UAXS/NAD+/UDP-GlcA supply system; transient Agrobacterium expression in tobacco leaves
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: High-value enzyme for engineering production of bioactive flavonoid apiosides in heterologous hosts; useful scaffold for protein engineering of sugar donor selectivity
Pathway_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: No major growth penalty reported; native enzyme strictly requires UDP-apiose and does not use common donors such as UDP-Glc or UDP-Xyl
Pathway_Genes.Omics_Data: RNA-seq transcriptome analysis of G. uralensis; SRA BioProject PRJNA945816
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: GenBank accession OQ201607; crystal structure PDB 8HZZ; optimal activity at pH 8.0 and 37°C; broad acceptor promiscuity but strong donor specificity.

Pathway_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: Plant UDP-glycosyltransferase with 45-aa PSPG box and conserved RLGSDH motif
Pathway_Genes.Rate_Limiting_or_Key_Control_Step: Supports conserved apiosylation function in Leguminosae; key terminal step
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Catalyzes apiosyl transfer from UDP-apiose to flavonoid glycosides
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Gene cloning and enzyme catalysis assay
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. PtApiGT was identified from Leguminosae candidate genes using the unique 45-aa PSPG box. 2. Cloned PtApiGT showed apiosyltransferase activity in enzyme assays. 3. Its characterization supports that the RLGSDH motif is broadly associated with Leguminosae apiosyltransferases.
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential resource gene for synthetic biology production of flavonoid apiosides
Pathway_Genes.Omics_Data: Homology mining from public transcriptome resources
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Accession inferred from range OQ230794-OQ230797 reported for SsApiGT/PtApiGT/GiApiGT/GgApiGT; exact order not explicitly resolved from provided text.

Pathway_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: Plant UDP-glycosyltransferase with 45-aa PSPG box and conserved RLGSDH motif
Pathway_Genes.Rate_Limiting_or_Key_Control_Step: Supports conserved apiosylation function in Leguminosae; key terminal step
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Catalyzes apiosyl transfer from UDP-apiose to flavonoid glycosides
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Gene cloning or synthesis and enzyme catalysis assay
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. SsApiGT was identified from Leguminosae candidate genes using the unique 45-aa PSPG box. 2. SsApiGT displayed apiosyltransferase activity in vitro. 3. Its activity further supports the generality of the RLGSDH motif in Leguminosae ApiGTs.
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential enzyme source for engineered apioside biosynthesis
Pathway_Genes.Omics_Data: Homology mining from public transcriptome resources
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Accession inferred from range OQ230794-OQ230797 reported for SsApiGT/PtApiGT/GiApiGT/GgApiGT; exact order not explicitly resolved from provided text.

Pathway_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: Plant UDP-glycosyltransferase with 45-aa PSPG box and conserved RLGSDH motif
Pathway_Genes.Rate_Limiting_or_Key_Control_Step: Supports conserved apiosylation function in Leguminosae; key terminal step
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Catalyzes apiosyl transfer from UDP-apiose to flavonoid glycosides
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Gene cloning and enzyme catalysis assay
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. GgApiGT from G. glabra was functionally validated as an apiosyltransferase. 2. Its sequence is highly conserved with GuApiGT and other Leguminosae ApiGTs. 3. The result extends the conserved flavonoid apiosylation mechanism to another Glycyrrhiza species.
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Alternative ApiGT for pathway engineering and comparative enzyme studies
Pathway_Genes.Omics_Data: Homology mining from public transcriptome resources
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Accession inferred from range OQ230794-OQ230797 reported for SsApiGT/PtApiGT/GiApiGT/GgApiGT; exact order not explicitly resolved from provided text.

Pathway_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: Plant UDP-glycosyltransferase with 45-aa PSPG box and conserved RLGSDH motif
Pathway_Genes.Rate_Limiting_or_Key_Control_Step: Supports conserved apiosylation function in Leguminosae; key terminal step
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Catalyzes apiosyl transfer from UDP-apiose to flavonoid glycosides
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Gene cloning and enzyme catalysis assay
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. GiApiGT from G. inflata was identified as a functional apiosyltransferase. 2. Its activity supports the broad occurrence of the RLGSDH-associated ApiGT clade in Leguminosae. 3. The enzyme expands available catalysts for flavonoid apioside biosynthesis.
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Candidate biocatalyst for synthetic biology production of apiosides
Pathway_Genes.Omics_Data: Homology mining from public transcriptome resources
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Accession inferred from range OQ230794-OQ230797 reported for SsApiGT/PtApiGT/GiApiGT/GgApiGT; exact order not explicitly resolved from provided text.
